articles.title: Celtics clinch No. 2 seed in Eastern Conference playoffs with blowout win over Pelicans
articles.description:
Boston will compete in the NBA playoffs for the 12th consecutive season, the league's longest active streak.

The post Celtics clinch No. 2 seed in Eastern Conference playoffs with blowout win over Pelicans appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics secured No. 2 seed in Eastern Conference playoffs with a win over Pelicans.
This marks Boston's 12th consecutive playoff appearance, the longest active streak in the NBA.
Local fans can expect playoff games at TD Garden, boosting local economy and community spirit.

articles.title: Artemis II astronauts return from moon with a splashdown
articles.description:
It was a triumphant homecoming for the crew of four whose record-breaking lunar flyby revealed swaths of the moon’s far side never seen before by human eyes.

The post Artemis II astronauts return from moon with a splashdown appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Artemis II astronauts completed a successful lunar flyby, returning to Earth on April 10, 2026.
The crew's mission revealed previously unseen areas of the moon's far side.
Boston residents celebrate local astronaut involvement in groundbreaking space exploration efforts.

articles.title: War sends inflation soaring, mood of American consumers plunging
articles.description:
Consumer prices rose 3.3% in March from a year earlier, the Labor Department said Friday, up sharply from just 2.4% in February and the biggest yearly increase since May 2024.

The post War sends inflation soaring, mood of American consumers plunging appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Consumer prices in Boston rose 3.3% in March compared to last year.
Inflation increase is the highest since May 2024, impacting local purchasing power.
Declining consumer mood may affect local businesses and economic growth.

articles.title: ‘I am thinking about it,’ Kamala Harris says of 2028 presidential bid
articles.description:
She also recently launched a political action committee and began to travel across the United States to support Democrats, especially across the South.

The post ‘I am thinking about it,’ Kamala Harris says of 2028 presidential bid appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kamala Harris is considering a 2028 presidential bid, impacting local Democratic strategies.
She launched a political action committee to support Democrats, focusing on Southern states.
Boston residents may see increased political engagement as Harris travels nationwide.

articles.title: Mass. offshore wind farm developer sues to stop turbine maker from walking away
articles.description:
The lawsuit states that the project already has been significantly damaged by GE Renewable's “inexcusably poor performance,” and allowing the contractor to back out now would cause irreparable harm.

The post Mass. offshore wind farm developer sues to stop turbine maker from walking away appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts offshore wind farm developer files lawsuit against GE Renewable for contract breach.
Lawsuit claims GE's poor performance has already caused significant project damage.
Potential contractor withdrawal could lead to irreparable harm for Boston's renewable energy goals.

articles.title: Masters gnomes a hot commodity at Augusta National
articles.description:
This is the 10th and perhaps final year Augusta National will sell the limited edition gnome.

summary: Augusta National's limited edition gnome returns for its 10th and possibly final year.
